case_title: RYAN BURKE VS. CITIUITES, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURKE, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITIUITES, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURKE, RYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITIUITES, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $3,564.97 PRINCIPAL, $12.82 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,777.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
